name_en: Top-tier replica M11952. This Slouchy small handbag features Louis Vuitton's classic Monogram canvas, with a chic silhouette suitable for both shoulder carry and hand carry, handling business office or weekend outings. New season elements include fresh hardware and brand labels, highlighting the brand's enduring heritage and exquisite craftsmanship. Dimensions: 33 × 22 × 9cm
